step_rationale: Adipokine promoting monocyte recruitment and inflammatory lipid-profile dysregulation in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: Resistin promotes atherosclerotic inflammation and lipid dysregulation, increasing Type 1 MI recurrence risk.

references.title: Restricted T-Cell Repertoire in the Epicardial Adipose Tissue of Non-ST Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction Patients.
Adipokines and endothelial dysfunction in acute myocardial infarction and the risk of recurrent cardiovascular events.

trials.title: Biomarkers, Hemodynamic and Echocardiographic Predictors of Ischemic Strokes and Their Influence on the Course and Prognosis
interventions: ADMA (asymmetric dimethylarginine) , NTproBNP (N-terminal pro b-type natriuretic peptide), IL-6 (Interleukin 6), Adiponectina, Leptine, Syndecan, Resistin
